response.justification: The resume does not align with the core requirements of the role, particularly in embedded networking security with C programming and Linux kernel experience. While the candidate has strong general software development skills, there is no demonstrated expertise in security features, networking protocols, or embedded systems, which are critical for this position.
strengths: Strong general software development experience across multiple languages and domains
Proven ability to work in diverse technical environments (web, mobile, embedded)
Experience with open-source projects and community contributions
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C programming for embedded systems
Lacks specific security or networking experience required (MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, Linux kernel modifications)
No evidence of Japanese language proficiency or native-level proficiency mentioned
